descriptions: Bandidos and Black Army were in a feud over the hash market from 2014.
edges.evidence_quote: Beginning in 2014, a feud involving the Bandidos and the Black Army resulted in numerous shootings and assaults in Næstved, where both gangs have clubhouses.

edges.evidence_quote: The Black Cobra gang has been associated with gangs such as the Black Scorpions and Black Army within Denmark

descriptions: Black Jackets and Black Army are allies.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Rock Machine , Veles gang , Black Dogs , Bandogs , 210 International , Dogpack 416 , Black Army , Holmblaaa , Kommando 210

descriptions: Hells Angels and Black Army were in a turf war involving clashes and a grenade attack.
edges.evidence_quote: A turf war between the Hells Angels and the Black Army on Funen led to a number of clashes

descriptions: The Ramashish Koeri gang cooperated with these four gangs in committing murders.
edges.evidence_quote: The gang, along with four other caste-based gangs led by Ghamari Karwar, Rambachan Yadav, Triveni Kahar, and Gaurik was responsible for over hundred murders in the Kaimur region.

descriptions: City Crew MC is a feeder club for the US Coffin Cheaters MC.
edges.evidence_quote: City Crew Mc is a feeder club.

descriptions: Members of Clan Scarcia are affiliated with Basilischi.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono affiliati all'organizzazione dei Basilischi alcuni membri del clan Scarcia del materano

descriptions: Fuerzas Especiales 35 Coahuila is a group theoretically part of Los Chukys, operating under the Cártel del Noreste.
edges.evidence_quote: - Fuerzas Especiales 35 Coahuila: Teóricamente de Los Chukys, operan en el estado de Coahuila en las regiones del norte mayormente así como en municipios rurales y comunidades agrícolas.

Rockford crime family.description: The Rockford crime family was an Italian American Mafia crime family based in Rockford, Illinois, founded around 1920 by Antonio Musso. It operated independently from the nearby Chicago Outfit, engaging in racketeering, gambling, loan sharking, and murder. The family was led by Joseph Zammuto from 1957 to 1974, then by Frank Buscemi until its decline in the early 2000s.

descriptions: The Rockford crime family is listed as an ally of the Chicago Outfit in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Rockford crime family

descriptions: The Rockford crime family is listed as an ally of the Milwaukee family.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Rockford crime family

descriptions: Rockford boss Vince had close ties with Bonanno capo Riela.
edges.evidence_quote: He also kept close ties and friendship with Bonanno family capo Anthony "Tony" Riela, from New Jersey.

descriptions: Infobox lists Bonanno crime family as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bonanno crime family , Chicago Outfit , Milwaukee crime family , Springfield crime family

descriptions: Chicago Outfit associates moved to Rockford to join the Rockford family.
edges.evidence_quote: During the late 1950s, many associates of the Chicago Outfit began relocating to Rockford to join Zammuto's Mafia family.

descriptions: Rockford boss Zammuto had close ties with Chicago Outfit boss Aiuppa.
edges.evidence_quote: As boss Zammuto maintained close ties and friendships with Chicago Outfit boss Joseph Aiuppa

descriptions: Chicago Outfit supported Saladino becoming Rockford boss.
edges.evidence_quote: With the support of the Chicago Outfit longtime Rockford member Frank "Gumba" Saladino became the boss.

descriptions: Rockford member Saladino associated with Chicago Outfit crew for contract murders.
edges.evidence_quote: In the 1970s, Saladino associated himself with the Chicago Outfit's South Side/26th Street crew in committing many contract murders for the Chicago Outfit.

descriptions: Rockford boss Saladino was indicted alongside Chicago Outfit members in Operation Family Secrets.
edges.evidence_quote: On April 25, 2005, the U.S. Department of Justice launched Operation Family Secrets which indicted Frank Saladino alongside thirteen Chicago Outfit members and associates under the RICO Act

descriptions: Infobox lists Chicago Outfit as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bonanno crime family , Chicago Outfit , Milwaukee crime family , Springfield crime family

descriptions: The Rockford family was independent but geographically close to the Chicago Outfit.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1960, the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) confirmed that the Rockford family had remained an independent crime family, even though they were within close distance to the powerful Chicago Outfit.

descriptions: FBI concluded there was little connection between the two families.
edges.evidence_quote: It was concluded by the FBI that Ferraro did not know the boss of the Rockford family, confirming that there was little connection between the two crime families.

descriptions: Rockford boss Zammuto had close ties with Milwaukee boss Balistrieri.
edges.evidence_quote: As boss Zammuto maintained close ties and friendships with ... Milwaukee family boss Frank Balistrieri.

descriptions: Rockford underboss Vince worked with Milwaukee boss Balistrieri in illegal rackets.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1981, the FBI revealed that Vince had become Rockford's underboss and had been working with Milwaukee family boss Frank Balistrieri in a number of illegal rackets.

descriptions: Rockford boss Gulotta had close friendships with Milwaukee boss Balistrieri.
edges.evidence_quote: Gulotta maintained close friendships with Zammuto and Milwaukee boss Frank Balistrieri.

descriptions: Infobox lists Milwaukee crime family as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bonanno crime family , Chicago Outfit , Milwaukee crime family , Springfield crime family

descriptions: Infobox lists Springfield crime family as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bonanno crime family , Chicago Outfit , Milwaukee crime family , Springfield crime family

descriptions: Rockford consigliere Joseph Zito was brother to Springfield boss Frank Zito.
edges.evidence_quote: Zammuto's consigliere Joseph Zito was a brother to the Springfield Mafia boss Frank Zito.

'Ndrina Avignone.description: The Avignone are a 'ndrina of the 'Ndrangheta, originating from Taurianova, Reggio Calabria. They operate in Taurianova and were involved in drug trafficking in Genoa during the 1990s. Allied with the Mamone, Piromalli, Zappia, and Gullace-Raso-Albanese clans. The DIA describes them as one of the most traditional and high-profile criminal organizations in the 'Ndrangheta.

descriptions: Avignone is a 'ndrina (sub-group) of the 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: Gli Avignone sono una 'ndrina della 'ndrangheta

descriptions: Avignone and Fazzalari are part of the same criminal alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 12 dicembre 2017 si conclude l'operazione Terramara-Closed ... presunte affiliate ai Avignone -Zagari-Fazzalari-Viola

descriptions: Avignone allied with Gullace-Raso-Albanese in Calabria.
edges.evidence_quote: In Calabria sono alleati dei ... Gullace-Raso-Albanese

descriptions: Avignone allied with Mamone in Genoa during the 1990s.
edges.evidence_quote: negli anni '90 hanno operato nel traffico di droga a Genova e dove sono alleati dei Mamone

descriptions: Avignone allied with Piromalli in Calabria.
edges.evidence_quote: In Calabria sono alleati dei Piromalli

descriptions: Avignone allied with Zappia in Calabria.
edges.evidence_quote: In Calabria sono alleati dei ... Zappia

descriptions: Avignone supported Facchineri-Varone in the 1960s faida.
edges.evidence_quote: I primi sono sostenuti anche dagli Avignone e i secondi dai Ligato- Pesce e i Piromalli .

descriptions: Piromalli made a pact with Avignone and others in the 1970s.
edges.evidence_quote: I Piromalli fecero un patto con le 'ndrine dei Pesce, Mancuso, De Stefano, Mammoliti e Avignone, per gestire le enormi ricchezze che sarebbero arrivate e per evitare una futura guerra.

descriptions: Piromalli and Avignone were targeted together in operation Gerry.
edges.evidence_quote: 23 marzo 2017: operazione Gerry contro le cosche Bellocco, Piromalli, Molè, Avignone e Paviglianiti

descriptions: Avignone 'ndrina was linked to Piromalli.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 1º aprile 1977 avvenne l'eccidio di Razzà in cui persero la vita due carabinieri e due membri della ndrina Avignone, legati ai Piromalli

descriptions: Zagari and Avignone are part of the same criminal alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 12 dicembre 2017 si conclude l'operazione Terramara-Closed che porta all'arresto di 44 persone ... presunte affiliate ai Avignone -Zagari-Fazzalari-Viola

Badr Organization.description: Iraqi Shia Islamist political party and paramilitary organization, formed in 1982 as the military wing of the Supreme Council for Islamic Revolution in Iraq (SCIRI). Based in Iran during the Iran–Iraq War, it fought the Ba'athist regime of Saddam Hussein. After the 2003 US-led invasion, it integrated into Iraqi security forces and later became a political party. It is part of the Popular Mobilization Forces and has been active against ISIL.

descriptions: Al-Qaeda declared war on the Badr Brigades in Iraq.
edges.evidence_quote: In Iraq it has openly declared war on the Badr Brigades

descriptions: Badr Organization fought against ISIL in Iraq.
edges.evidence_quote: Badr Brigade forces, and their Iranian commanders, have come to prominence in 2014 fighting the Islamic State of Iraq and the Levant (ISIL) in Iraq.

edges.target: Supreme Council for Islamic Revolution in Iraq
descriptions: Badr Organization was the military wing of SCIRI.
edges.evidence_quote: The Badr Brigade, formed in 1982 and led by Iranian officers, served as the military arm of the Supreme Council for Islamic Revolution in Iraq (SCIRI)

descriptions: Badr Organization is listed as an opponent of Islamic State.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: ... Badr Organization

Markham Gang.description: The Markham Gang was a 19th-century criminal organization based in Ontario, Canada, evolving from groups supporting the Upper Canada Rebellion of 1837. It engaged in petty theft and counterfeiting, using a courier network to transport stolen goods. The gang was broken up in 1846, with members imprisoned but later released.

descriptions: GAL conducted a dirty war against ETA, killing ETA members and exiles.
edges.evidence_quote: During the 1980s, a 'dirty war' ensued using the Grupos Antiterroristas de Liberación (GAL, 'Antiterrorist Liberation Groups'), a paramilitary group which billed themselves as counter-terrorist, active between 1983 and 1987. The GAL's stated mission was to avenge every ETA killing with another killing of ETA exiles

descriptions: ETA and GAL were adversaries in the Basque conflict, with GAL targeting ETA members and ETA attacking GAL-associated targets.
edges.evidence_quote: These were the first systematic demonstrations in the Basque Country against political violence. Also in 1986, in Ordizia, ETA gunned down María Dolores Katarain...

descriptions: GAL was an anti-ETA group.
edges.evidence_quote: Anti-ETA groups: Grupos Antiterroristas de Liberación (GAL)

descriptions: The PKK cooperated with THKP-C/MLSPB as part of the Peoples' United Revolutionary Movement.
edges.evidence_quote: In March 2016, the PKK helped to launch the Peoples' United Revolutionary Movement with nine other Kurdish and Turkish revolutionary leftist, socialist and communist groups (including the TKP/ML , THKP-C/MLSPB , MKP , TKEP/L , TİKB , DKP , DK and MLKP ) with the aim of overthrowing the Turkish government of Recep Tayyip Erdoğan.

descriptions: Bandidos kidnapped and robbed a Kinsmen member.
edges.evidence_quote: kidnapping and robbing Scott Spencer, a member of the rival Kinsmen Motorcycle Club

descriptions: The Maesano had a feud with the Stillitano family in the 1920s.
edges.evidence_quote: negli anni 20 del XX secolo venne accertato che controllava il caporalato dell'attività agricola, cosa che provocò una faida con la famiglia Stillitano a Drosi di Rizzicone

descriptions: Maisano and Stillitano were in conflict in the Drosi di Rizziconi feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Faida di Drosi di Rizziconi, tra i Maisano e gli Stillitano.

descriptions: Palmers MC was created to counter Death Riders MC, a Hells Angels support club.
edges.evidence_quote: It was created to counter Hell's Angels allies, the Rockers MC, Evil ones and Death Riders MC support clubs.

descriptions: Rock Machine killed a member of Death Riders MC, initiating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: three members of the Rock Machine entered a business in downtown Montreal. They assassinated Pierre Daoust, a member of a Hells Angel support club, the Death Riders Motorcycle Club.

descriptions: Death Riders MC assimilated into Rockers MC North, becoming part of Rockers.
edges.evidence_quote: a longstanding HAMC-affiliated outlaw motorcycle club based in Laval, Quebec known as the Death Riders MC assimilated into a new chapter of the Rockers Motor Club which became known as Rockers MC North.
